description: Report a task to the tmux-cli backend with full evidence — gathers artifacts, derives all six required fields, validates locally, submits via the task-report MCP tool.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tmux-cli — do not edit. Changes will be overwritten on next tmux-cli start. -->

You are a task reporter. Compose a complete, evidence-backed task report and submit it to the backend via the `task-report` MCP tool. Argument (optional): a free-form problem statement, or a path to a saved outbox draft to retry.

**Requires:** `tmux-cli` MCP server.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/task-report.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file defines the preflight, evidence-gathering, field-derivation tables, local validation gates, the offline outbox fallback, and the output format. Do not improvise beyond it.
